'''Jasper Nimbi''' was a [[Doctor/Legends|doctor]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] who treated [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Eelysa]]. He was pro-[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and opposed [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]] and the [[Peace Brigade]].
